urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Laos says it can't determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol
latest.summary: Laos says it cannot determine blame or cause for the deaths of six deaths linked to methanol-tainted alcohol. The victims included citizens from the UK, Australia, Denmark, and the US.
latest.details: Laos says it cannot determine blame or cause for the deaths of six deaths linked to methanol-tainted alcohol. The victims included citizens from the UK, Australia, Denmark, and the US. The Laos Ministry of Public Security stated that no autopsies were conducted on the bodies, which hindered their investigation. The distillery owner is facing charges for selling harmful food products, but these charges do not relate to the deaths.
latest.full_brief: Laos says it cannot determine blame or cause for the deaths of six deaths linked to methanol-tainted alcohol. The victims included citizens from the UK, Australia, Denmark, and the US. The Laos Ministry of Public Security stated that no autopsies were conducted on the bodies, which hindered their investigation. The distillery owner is facing charges for selling harmful food products, but these charges do not relate to the deaths.

latest.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
latest.summary: The US military has conducted strikes on Iran for the seventh consecutive night following the end of a temporary ceasefire. US Central Command reported targeting various military sites and infrastructure in Iran.
latest.details: The US military has conducted strikes on Iran for the seventh consecutive night following the end of a temporary ceasefire. US Central Command reported targeting various military sites and infrastructure in Iran. In response, Iran has targeted US allies in the region, including attacks on power and water plants in Kuwait. Jordan's military intercepted Iranian missiles fired into its airspace, but no damage was reported.
latest.full_brief: The US military has conducted strikes on Iran for the seventh consecutive night following the end of a temporary ceasefire. US Central Command reported targeting various military sites and infrastructure in Iran. In response, Iran has targeted US allies in the region, including attacks on power and water plants in Kuwait. Jordan's military intercepted Iranian missiles fired into its airspace, but no damage was reported.

latest.title: Helicopters dump water as huge Norway fire destroys homes
latest.summary: A massive fire in Drammen, southern Norway, has destroyed more than 100 homes. Hundreds of residents have been evacuated from the area, which is located about 30 miles west of Oslo.
latest.details: A massive fire in Drammen, southern Norway, has destroyed more than 100 homes. Hundreds of residents have been evacuated from the area, which is located about 30 miles west of Oslo. Firefighters are currently battling the blaze, which has spread to a nearby forest. Local police have stated that the fire is still not under control.
latest.full_brief: A massive fire in Drammen, southern Norway, has destroyed more than 100 homes. Hundreds of residents have been evacuated from the area, which is located about 30 miles west of Oslo. Firefighters are currently battling the blaze, which has spread to a nearby forest. Local police have stated that the fire is still not under control.

latest.title: Space start-up launches India’s first commercial rocket designed for orbit
latest.summary: Skyroot Aerospace achieved India's first orbital launch with its Vikram-1 rocket. The launch took place from the Indian Space Research Organisation's facility in Sriharikota.
latest.details: Skyroot Aerospace achieved India's first orbital launch with its Vikram-1 rocket. The launch took place from the Indian Space Research Organisation's facility in Sriharikota. This makes India the third country to have a private company capable of orbital launches, following the US and China. The mission successfully placed six payloads into orbit, including scientific instruments and symbolic items honoring Indian scientists.
latest.full_brief: Skyroot Aerospace achieved India's first orbital launch with its Vikram-1 rocket. The launch took place from the Indian Space Research Organisation's facility in Sriharikota. This makes India the third country to have a private company capable of orbital launches, following the US and China. The mission successfully placed six payloads into orbit, including scientific instruments and symbolic items honoring Indian scientists.

latest.title: Indian activist on hunger strike for 20 days forcibly taken to hospital
latest.summary: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting for educational reforms alongside the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP).
latest.details: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting for educational reforms alongside the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP). Following his removal from the protest site, CJP founder Abhijeet Dipke has begun an indefinite fast in Wangchuk's place. Wangchuk's wife has requested that no medical treatment be administered without her consent.
latest.full_brief: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting for educational reforms alongside the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP). Following his removal from the protest site, CJP founder Abhijeet Dipke has begun an indefinite fast in Wangchuk's place. Wangchuk's wife has requested that no medical treatment be administered without her consent.

latest.title: Control, threats, disfiguring surgery: My life inside Jeffrey Epstein's 'cult'
latest.summary: Anya, a former assistant of Jeffrey Epstein, shared her experiences of living under his control. She described how Epstein manipulated and coerced women into dependency, often using deception to recruit them.
latest.details: Anya, a former assistant of Jeffrey Epstein, shared her experiences of living under his control. She described how Epstein manipulated and coerced women into dependency, often using deception to recruit them. Anya revealed that she was forced to undergo unnecessary surgery as part of Epstein's control over her life. The account highlights the psychological manipulation that can occur in such abusive relationships.
latest.full_brief: Anya, a former assistant of Jeffrey Epstein, shared her experiences of living under his control. She described how Epstein manipulated and coerced women into dependency, often using deception to recruit them. Anya revealed that she was forced to undergo unnecessary surgery as part of Epstein's control over her life. The account highlights the psychological manipulation that can occur in such abusive relationships.

latest.title: He made history in Congress - then the Supreme Court changed its mind
latest.summary: Shomari Figures made history as the first black representative for Tuskegee in Congress. He secured $1 million in federal funding to build a civic center that will serve multiple community needs.
latest.details: Shomari Figures made history as the first black representative for Tuskegee in Congress. He secured $1 million in federal funding to build a civic center that will serve multiple community needs. However, a recent Supreme Court ruling has raised concerns about the future of minority representation in Congress. Local officials fear that if Figures loses his seat due to redistricting, the community will lose vital federal support.
latest.full_brief: Shomari Figures made history as the first black representative for Tuskegee in Congress. He secured $1 million in federal funding to build a civic center that will serve multiple community needs. However, a recent Supreme Court ruling has raised concerns about the future of minority representation in Congress. Local officials fear that if Figures loses his seat due to redistricting, the community will lose vital federal support.

latest.title: How these twins' rare growth disorder could provide the key to preventing cancer
latest.summary: The town of Piñas in southern Ecuador has a notably high incidence of Laron syndrome, a rare genetic condition affecting growth. María Luísa Romero and her twin sister, both affected by the syndrome, support each other through its challenges.
latest.details: The town of Piñas in southern Ecuador has a notably high incidence of Laron syndrome, a rare genetic condition affecting growth. María Luísa Romero and her twin sister, both affected by the syndrome, support each other through its challenges. Researchers believe that studying Laron syndrome could lead to breakthroughs in cancer prevention. The condition is characterized by an inability to utilize growth hormone, and its genetic mutation was first identified by paediatrician Zvi Laron.
latest.full_brief: The town of Piñas in southern Ecuador has a notably high incidence of Laron syndrome, a rare genetic condition affecting growth. María Luísa Romero and her twin sister, both affected by the syndrome, support each other through its challenges. Researchers believe that studying Laron syndrome could lead to breakthroughs in cancer prevention. The condition is characterized by an inability to utilize growth hormone, and its genetic mutation was first identified by paediatrician Zvi Laron.

latest.title: Fine, electric mountain bikes don’t suck
latest.summary: Electric mountain bikes (eMTBs) are often misunderstood, with many believing they make riders faster. In Europe, eMTBs are limited to a pedal-assist speed of 25km/h, which is slower than many traditional mountain bikes can achieve.
latest.details: Electric mountain bikes (eMTBs) are often misunderstood, with many believing they make riders faster. In Europe, eMTBs are limited to a pedal-assist speed of 25km/h, which is slower than many traditional mountain bikes can achieve. The author experienced a significant change in confidence and control after riding an eMTB, especially after a previous injury. The introduction of powerful motors in mountain biking is seen as the next evolution in the sport, similar to past technological advancements.
latest.full_brief: Electric mountain bikes (eMTBs) are often misunderstood, with many believing they make riders faster. In Europe, eMTBs are limited to a pedal-assist speed of 25km/h, which is slower than many traditional mountain bikes can achieve. The author experienced a significant change in confidence and control after riding an eMTB, especially after a previous injury. The introduction of powerful motors in mountain biking is seen as the next evolution in the sport, similar to past technological advancements.

latest.title: ‘It’s only going to get worse’: wildfires forcing firefighters to make impossible choices
latest.summary: Firefighters are increasingly facing difficult decisions as wildfires become more intense and widespread due to climate change. The situation has led to operational challenges, with firefighters needing to prioritize which blazes to combat.
latest.details: Firefighters are increasingly facing difficult decisions as wildfires become more intense and widespread due to climate change. The situation has led to operational challenges, with firefighters needing to prioritize which blazes to combat. Recent wildfires in western Europe have resulted in record-breaking destruction and numerous fatalities. Smoke from Canadian wildfires has also impacted air quality in cities like Toronto, making it the most polluted city in the world at one point.
latest.full_brief: Firefighters are increasingly facing difficult decisions as wildfires become more intense and widespread due to climate change. The situation has led to operational challenges, with firefighters needing to prioritize which blazes to combat. Recent wildfires in western Europe have resulted in record-breaking destruction and numerous fatalities. Smoke from Canadian wildfires has also impacted air quality in cities like Toronto, making it the most polluted city in the world at one point.

latest.title: ‘We are preserving a tradition’: how Ghana’s sensationalist film posters became collectible art
latest.summary: Hand-painted film posters have become a significant part of Ghana's film culture, particularly from the late 1970s to the early 2000s. Artists created these posters as reinterpretations of films, often leading to humorous and surreal representations.
latest.details: Hand-painted film posters have become a significant part of Ghana's film culture, particularly from the late 1970s to the early 2000s. Artists created these posters as reinterpretations of films, often leading to humorous and surreal representations. The practice declined with the rise of personal televisions, but interest in these artworks has surged due to online marketing. Deadly Prey Gallery, co-founded by Robert Kofi, works to preserve this art form and connect artists with a global audience.
latest.full_brief: Hand-painted film posters have become a significant part of Ghana's film culture, particularly from the late 1970s to the early 2000s. Artists created these posters as reinterpretations of films, often leading to humorous and surreal representations. The practice declined with the rise of personal televisions, but interest in these artworks has surged due to online marketing. Deadly Prey Gallery, co-founded by Robert Kofi, works to preserve this art form and connect artists with a global audience.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
